title: Deploying JetBrains Gateway in a corporate world
summary: Deploying stuff in a corporate environment can sometimes be challenging due to proxies or firewalls. This article describes how I deployed JetBrains Gateway in a corporate environment with no internet access.

title: Automatically transform complex python methods to polars expressions
summary: Tired of writing complicated Polars expressions? polarIFy automatically translates your easy-to-read Python methods into efficient Polars expressions!

structuredData.headline: Automatically transform complex python methods to polars expressions
structuredData.description: Tired of writing complicated Polars expressions? polarIFy automatically translates your easy-to-read Python methods into efficient Polars expressions!

title: Optimize pickling disk space for deploying scikit-learn trees to production
summary: We present an open source library to shrink pickled scikit-learn and lightgbm models. We will provide insights of how pickling ML models work and how to improve the disk representation. With this approach, we can reduce the deployment size of machine learning applications up to 6x.

toc.value: Reconstructing the state of the tree

structuredData.headline: Optimize pickling disk space for deploying scikit-learn trees to production
structuredData.description: We present an open source library to shrink pickled scikit-learn and lightgbm models. We will provide insights of how pickling ML models work and how to improve the disk representation. With this approach, we can reduce the deployment size of machine learning applications up to 6x.
